(Sarah leads us off from the studios of MTV's TRL.) She said of her hit, "So Yesterday", "When I heard it for the first time on the radio, I was freaking out""So yesterday, so yesterday; I'm just a bird that's already..."

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sarah continues our tour down TRL memory lane.) This colorful artist's video, "Trouble", was shot on the same location as "Little House on the Prairie". Check it out..."In my own town; I'm trouble, yeah, trouble now..."

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sarah takes us on another stop on TRL Street.) Our Christina Aguilera video is a track on this 2002 CD, also the name of her world tour:"I am beautiful; no matter what they say..."

[IMAGE CLUE]
(We now return you to Sarah in the TRL studios in New York.) Once a backup singer for the likes of Faith Evans and Puff Daddy, she's hit 'em up good ever since. Take a look... "From the crib to the ride and the clothes; so you better let him know..."
